title: Acetosella leptophylla

It belongs to the genus Acetosella, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as wood sorrels. The family Oxalidaceae is a small but distinct group of flowering plants that are found in various parts of the world. Acetosella leptophylla is native to Australia and is a relatively rare species. The classification of Acetosella leptophylla reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
